mapper.select: SELECT SUM(IIF(현재재직상태 = N'재직', 1, 0)) AS active, SUM(IIF(현재재직상태 = N'휴직', 1, 0)) AS onLeave, SUM(IIF(현재재직상태 = N'퇴사', 1, 0)) AS resigned, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J_직원_재직기간 WHERE 입사일 >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AND 입사일 < DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) ) AS monthlyHire, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM J_직원_재직기간 WHERE 퇴사일 >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1) AND 퇴사일 < DATEADD(MONTH, 1, DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1)) ) AS monthlyResign FROM J_직원
SELECT d.부서명 AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM J_직원_부서배치 b JOIN J_부서 d ON b.부서코드 = d.부서코드 WHERE b.종료일 IS NULL AND b.주부서여부 = 1 GROUP BY d.부서명 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT 구간 AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, 입사일, GETDATE()) < 365 THEN N'1년 미만' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, 입사일, GETDATE()) < 1095 THEN N'1~3년' WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, 입사일, GETDATE()) < 1825 THEN N'3~5년' ELSE N'5년 이상' END AS 구간 FROM J_직원_재직기간 WHERE 퇴사일 IS NULL ) t GROUP BY 구간
SELECT TOP 10 CONVERT(CHAR(10), h.발령일, 23) AS eventDate, e.이름 AS name, h.발령유형 AS eventType, ISNULL(h.사유, N'') AS reason FROM J_직원_발령이력 h JOIN J_직원 e ON h.아이디 = e.아이디 ORDER BY h.발령일 DESC, h.발령PK DESC
